insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every new session you complete will be a significant step forward, and by focusing on building a consistent daily habit, you'll be able to track your progress and see tangible improvements in your scores over time. Starting with just one session today can help you establish a foundation for growth, and by doing so, you'll be able to break your current streak of 0 days and begin working towards a stronger understanding of the material.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
